data.title: FDA OKs Novartis Prostate Cancer Treatment, Triples Eligible Patient Pool
data.description: FDA approves Novartis' Pluvicto for advanced prostate cancer patients who have received ARPI therapy.

data.title: European Drug Regulator Gives Thumbs Down To Eli Lilly's Alzheimer's Drug, Analyst Says It Is Incremental Win For Biogen
data.description: Eli Lilly's donanemab faces a setback as EMA's CHMP issues a negative opinion. Analysts expect Lilly to appeal, citing past reversals in similar cases.

data.title: Eye Care Company Topcon Goes Private Via Management Buyout Deal At Huge Premium
data.description: Topcon launches a management buyout with KKR and JIC Capital, offering 3,300 yen per share. The move supports its long-term vision and strategic transformation.

data.title: You Could Be Making $250,000 and Still Be Considered 'Middle Class'— Here's What It Really Takes to Be Rich Now
JP Morgan's Stock Picks In The Power Sector Amid Regulatory Uncertainty
data.description: JP Morgan analyst Jeremy Tonet remains bullish on the "washed out" power sector, citing strong demand growth and favorable trends despite regulatory uncertainty.
